cold_open.hook: Canvas data breach hits 3.7 million students—Instructure's security is the Crocs IPO of edtech governance.

markets.macro_note: Dollar up on hot inflation; Dow dragging while mega-cap tech holds the line.

big_story.story_title: Alibaba's core profit plunges 84% as CEO claims AI ROI is 'extremely clear'
big_story.angle: When your profit collapses 84% but you're still confident about AI returns, you've either seen the future or you're choosing violence with the definition of 'clear.'

quick_hits.angle: Companies cashing tariff refunds after Supreme Court win—this is the market finally pricing in that Trump's tariff theater has an expiration date.
Trump phone shipping this week; CEO's confidence level suggests he's never heard of supply chain reality.
Alexa moving into Amazon.com—this stock has commitment issues and now it's moving in with itself.
Philippine Senate lockdown after gunshots—geopolitical volatility creeping into markets' peripheral vision.

odd_thing.joke_angle: Putin hails new ballistic missile test while inflation eats Social Security—competing for 'worst news of the day' is a race nobody wins.

yesterday_callback.topic: Companies are getting tariff refunds after the Supreme Court decision—this is the market finally pricing in that Trump's tariff theater has limits
yesterday_callback.fresh_take: Today's refund wave proves the Supreme Court ruling wasn't theater—it's actual money moving; the tariff bluff is being called in real time.

sign_off.callback_target: Alibaba's 84% profit collapse vs. CEO's 'extremely clear' AI confidence—the most honest thing said all week was the gap between those two numbers.
